heading: Omitted
label: 1252 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted funds distributed to members of the tribes from Federal and State income taxes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–253, § 286 Stat. 64Mar. 17, 1972
